infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: DashGuard needs your camera to capture parking violations and road incidents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: DashGuard needs access to your photo library to attach evidence to reports.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: DashGuard uses your location to auto-detect the nearest police department and attach GPS coordinates to your report.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: DashGuard needs microphone access when recording video evidence.

plugins.cameraPermission: DashGuard needs your camera to capture parking violations and incidents.
plugins.microphonePermission: DashGuard needs microphone access for video recording.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: DashGuard uses your location to find the nearest police department.

plugins.photosPermission: DashGuard needs access to your photos to attach evidence to reports.
